name: Apricot or Peach Melba
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the syrup, bring the sugar, water, lemon juice and zest to a boil.
Steep for 10 minutes.
2. Poach apricots or peaches until tender. If using peaches, remove the skin.
Let them cool in the syrup.
3. Make the puree in a blender - puree the raspberries with the lemon juice.
Add sugar to taste.
Presentation:
Remove fruits from syrup, removing any peach pits. In a small bowl, place one scoop
of vanilla ice cream and cover with raspberry sauce. Garnish with whipped cream
and toasted almonds.
Yield: 6 Servings
